message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor DarkSlateGray
  ActorBorderColor Black
  ActorBackgroundColor WhiteSmoke
  ParticipantBorderColor Black
  ParticipantBackgroundColor LightSteelBlue
  LifeLineBorderColor Black
  LifeLineBackgroundColor WhiteSmoke
}

title TCP Connection Lifecycle

participant "client" as ClientApp
participant "tcpclient" as TcpClient
participant "tcpserver" as TcpServer
participant "server" as ServerApp

== Connection Establishment ==
activate ServerApp
TcpServer -> TcpServer: listen
activate TcpServer
TcpServer -[blue]> TcpServer: LISTEN
deactivate TcpServer

activate ClientApp
ClientApp -> TcpClient: connect
activate TcpClient
TcpClient -[teal]> TcpClient: SYN-SENT
TcpClient -> TcpServer: SYN
activate TcpServer
TcpServer -[blue]> TcpServer: SYN-RECEIVED
TcpServer --> TcpClient: SYN, ACK
TcpClient --> TcpServer: ACK
TcpClient -[green]> TcpClient: ESTABLISHED
TcpServer -[green]> TcpServer: ESTABLISHED
deactivate ClientApp
deactivate TcpClient
deactivate TcpServer

== Data Transfer ==
activate ServerApp
ServerApp -> TcpServer: write
TcpServer -> TcpServer: EPOLLIN
TcpServer --> TcpClient: PSH, ACK
TcpClient --> TcpServer: ACK
deactivate ServerApp

activate ClientApp
TcpClient -> TcpClient: EPOLLIN
ClientApp -> TcpClient: read
deactivate ClientApp
deactivate TcpClient
deactivate TcpServer

== Connection Termination (Server Initiated) ==
activate ServerApp
ServerApp -> TcpServer: close
activate TcpServer
TcpServer -[purple]> TcpServer: FIN_WAIT1
TcpServer --> TcpClient: FIN, ACK
activate TcpClient
TcpClient -[pink]> TcpClient: CLOSE_WAIT
TcpClient --> TcpServer: ACK
TcpServer -[orange]> TcpServer: FIN_WAIT2
deactivate TcpClient

== Connection Termination (Client Initiated) ==
activate ClientApp
TcpClient -> TcpClient: EPOLLRDHUP
ClientApp -> TcpClient: close
activate TcpClient
TcpClient -[magenta]> TcpClient: LAST_ACK
TcpClient --> TcpServer: FIN
TcpServer --> TcpClient: ACK
TcpClient -[red]> TcpClient: CLOSE
deactivate TcpClient
deactivate ClientApp

== Final Cleanup ==
TcpServer -[yellow]> TcpServer: TIMEWAIT
note right of TcpServer: timer 60s
TcpServer -[red]> TcpServer: CLOSE
deactivate TcpServer
deactivate ServerApp

@enduml
```
